theme: medieval city-state conquest roads rivers bridges forts farms mines watchtowers cavalry archers campaign map

entities.facing_rule: static shared building art loaded through AssetManager and BitmapFactory while ownership rings and warning labels communicate state changes
entities.animation_rule: GameView draws tile art per node type and overlays owner glow, selection stroke, and doctrine state text instead of leaving plain circles
entities.movement_rule: static map structures define capture endpoints and supply connectivity

entities.facing_rule: GameView lerps packet position between route nodes and draws unit-type banner silhouettes oriented along the current route vector
entities.animation_rule: packet banners travel smoothly, use distinct spear bow cavalry and levy marks, and trigger arrival combat or capture feedback on contact
entities.movement_rule: troop packets inherit route speed from unit type, supply state, rally state, and logistics upgrades

entities.facing_rule: roads follow linked node pairs and bridge segments gain separate pulse and broken-state rendering
entities.animation_rule: bridges thicken and glow during repair windows while broken routes switch to danger color and block packet travel
entities.movement_rule: route props are static connectors that govern packet traversal and supply reachability

required_runtime_checks: GameView loads shared tile assets through AssetManager and BitmapFactory from game_art paths
node sites render type-specific art instead of a single generic marker
marching packets move by lerp across routes instead of snapping between nodes
packet marks distinguish levy spear archer and cavalry traffic
route ownership pressure is communicated with capture hit and shield feedback
runtime art map reflects the actual route and node rendering used by GameView
